title: Smithing template indicator
description: Smithing template display with visible pattern
body:
# Smithing template indicator
**This resource pack allows you to see which smithing template is applied to the armor.**
**Beta**

---
**required [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

---
